code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut val = 0
mut neg = false
mut in_tok = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if in_tok
      let signed = if neg
        0 - val
      else
        val
      end
      if signed > 0
        total = total + signed * 2
      end
      val = 0
      neg = false
      in_tok = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    neg = true
    in_tok = true
  else if b == 43
    in_tok = true
  else
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_tok = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("result=#{total}")
